en.title: Question Assistant
en.prompt: Please analyze the following text and generate a set of insightful questions that challenge the reader's perspective and spark curiosity. Your response must encourage deeper thinking. Please begin by editing the following text: [text for deeper thinking]
en.remark: Ask from multiple angles to trigger deep thinking. Contributed by @meishiwanwan.

metaDescription: Need fresh perspectives? Generate insightful questions to challenge views and spark curiosity. Encourage deeper thinking on any topic.

faq.a: The first 3 usually have depth; later ones drift into broad philosophy ("what does this mean for humanity"). Append "each question must be answerable with a concrete verifiable answer; avoid unverifiable philosophical musings" and quality improves significantly.

faq.q: How is this different from ID 270 Question Assistant Pro?
faq.a: ID 176 is the general "questions around a topic" version; ID 270 has a more complete structure (including hypotheses, clarifications, counter-examples). Use 176 for writing-stage thinking, use 270 for deep research or debate prep. Combining both works best.
